LAW AND MOTION 301,NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA PRICE'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 473 IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT ARISES FROM A MISCOMMUNICATION AS TO CALENDARING, WHICH IS EXCUSABLE NEGLECT ON THIS CASE, ESPECIALLY GIVEN DEFENDANT'S PROMPT ATTEMPT TO FILE AN ANSWER ONCE THE MISTAKE WAS DISCOVERED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Sec. 473
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christina Chen Price, Esq., 415-441-8778, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CHRISTINA PRICE'S Motion For Order Vacating Default Judgment Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473 is granted. THE DEFAULT ARISES FROM A MISCOMMUNICATION AS TO CALENDARING, WHICH IS EXCUSABLE NEGLECT ON THIS CASE, ESPECIALLY GIVEN DEFENDANT'S PROMPT ATTEMPT TO FILE AN ANSWER ONCE THE MISTAKE WAS DISCOVERED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/PM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
